description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest and macOS-latest with Python versions 3.6, 3.7, and 3.8, excluding macOS-latest with Python 3.8. The job checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, lints with flake8, tests with pytest, and uploads coverage to Codecov.
